profile.name: Full name
profile.phoneSaveToVerify: Save your changes first to verify the new phone number.
profile.deletePhoneConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove your phone number? You will need to verify a new number to use phone-verified features.
profile.phoneDeleteError: Failed to remove phone number. Please try again.

errors.nameTooLong: Name must be 120 characters or fewer.
errors.phoneTooLong: Phone number must be 30 characters or fewer.
errors.emailTooLong: Email must be 254 characters or fewer.

otp.sendDescription: We will send a 6-digit verification code to {{phone}}.
otp.sendFailed: Failed to send the verification code. Please try again.
otp.whatsappUnavailable: WhatsApp is not currently available. Please try again later or contact support.
otp.expired: The verification code has expired. Request a new one.
otp.tooManyAttempts: Too many failed attempts. Please request a new code.
otp.invalid: Invalid verification code. Please try again.

emptyStates.returns: You have no return requests yet.
emptyStates.addresses: You have no saved addresses yet.
